sentence: PRIVACY POLICY
This app is an entertainement app that uses ARKit and TrueDepth Camera for playing the game, taking photos with AR character and face mask expressions onto 3D models.
This app, turns the place you use app in to backround of app by using your camera. And also you can take photos with AR character and the face masks by your camera within the app.
We do not use your Face or Place Data to personally identify any user of the application.
We just store device data that firebase allows with firebase.
We do not record and do not collect user generated videos on demand on camera roll or any photos from the app you want to keep your own device.

We only asking a permission to use your camera for playing the game, taking photos with AR character and face mask without any record or keep information and storage the photos taken via this app in your own device.

Todix Game Application values user privacy and places great importance on the protection of personal information. This privacy policy aims to provide you with information about the information collected, used, and safeguarded by the Todix Game Application.
Collected Information:

Todix Game Application may collect certain information to enhance the user’s gaming experience and provide services. This information may include technical data related to the user’s device, usage statistics, and in-game preferences. Todix Game Application does not collect personally identifiable information (such as name, email, etc.).
Use and Sharing:

Todix Game Application uses the collected information solely to improve the gaming experience, fulfill user requests, and provide services. This information is not shared with third parties or used for commercial purposes.
Security:

Todix Game Application takes appropriate physical and electronic measures to ensure the security of collected information. However, due to the nature of communication over the internet, complete security cannot be guaranteed.
Children’s Privacy:
Todix Game Application does not knowingly collect personal information from children under the age of 13.
Changes:
Todix Game Application reserves the right to update this privacy policy from time to time. We may make updates without prior notification. Therefore, we recommend reviewing this policy regularly.
This privacy policy applies to the Todix Game Application, and by using the application, you accept this policy.
Pakavi (PTY) LTD
